response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 16+ years of progressive experience and current Staff-level role. Demonstrates direct mastery of all primary stack technologies (React, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB) from Optilyz role, with current position building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks that perfectly align with the role's emerging requirements. Minor framework-level gaps (Nest.js, specific testing tools) are negligible given depth of underlying technical expertise.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 16+ years progressing to Staff Engineer; MIT CS degree plus extensive open-source contributions and architectural expertise

Direct proven mastery of entire primary stack: React at Optilyz, TypeScript and Node.js across multiple roles, MongoDB at Optilyz; currently building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq matching emerging requirements
Demonstrates full-stack depth across 12+ languages, strong testing/TDD culture, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), databases, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned in resume; while Node.js/TypeScript expertise suggests capability, specific framework experience not demonstrated
Concrete testing framework names (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) absent despite clear TDD emphasis; framework tool proficiency unverified
Most recent explicit cloud infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) documented through Optilyz (2021-2025) and Altom (2016-2018); current currency on cloud-native practices unclear

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development role
React + TypeScript + Node.js + MongoDB direct production experience
Nest.js framework not demonstrated in history
